page: Microsoft Azure D32s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance across several domains. The processor's advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions, support accelerated operations. Geekbench multi-core and single-core scores are in the strong category, with image processing reaching top-tier performance. Large-block memory bandwidth read and write speeds are also strong, measuring 216.15 GB/sec and 92.55 GB/sec respectively. Additionally, the server demonstrates top-tier text generation speeds of 403.9 tokens/sec for small language models and strong prompt processing speeds for medium models.

Given its dedicated hardware allocation and balanced resource density, the D32s_v6 offers a stable and predictable performance profile for general-purpose enterprise workloads. The absence of bundled local storage means storage costs are decoupled, allowing users to scale Premium Storage independently. This configuration is well-suited for applications such as static web serving, multi-threaded decompression tasks, image processing, and moderate-scale language model inference.
description: Microsoft Azure D32s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv6 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 32 dedicated vCPUs (16 physical cores) running at 4.2 GHz. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, and features no local storage or GPUs. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the instance leverages advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmarks show strong multi-core performance, high large-block memory bandwidth, and top-tier image processing and small-model LLM text generation speeds. This server is optimized for general-purpose enterprise workloads, static web serving, multi-threaded decompression, and moderate machine learning inference tasks where decoupled premium storage is utilized.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and no local storage, delivering strong multi-core and image processing performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32s_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 128 GB RAM, optimized for balanced enterprise workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and strong multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
Strong performance in large-block memory bandwidth and image processing
